title: French Cheese Soufflé
description: A rich and creamy French soufflé filled with melted cheese. This dessert is sure to impress your guests with its fluffy texture and decadent flavors.
instructions: Butter a 1-quart soufflé dish and coat with the grated cheese.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the Gruyère and Gouda cheese until melted.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and a pinch of salt.
Temper the egg yolks by slowly pouring the warm cheese sauce into the eggs, whisking constantly.
In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the egg whites into the egg yolk mixture until no white streaks remain.
Pour the mixture into the prepared soufflé dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the soufflé is puffed and golden brown.
